portfolio.intro: 保留当前项目内容，使用新的列表框架与路由结构。
portfolio.introEn: Existing project content, reorganized with a cleaner list layout and route structure.

thoughts.intro: 这里专门放文字内容、观点整理和方法记录。
thoughts.introEn: This page is dedicated to writing, reflections, and methods.

life.intro: 这里只保留生活痕迹本身：照片、片段、当下的场景与一句说明。
life.introEn: This page is reserved for the traces of everyday life itself: photos, moments, and a short note for each one.

channel.intro: 这里更适合做平台入口页：放账号链接、简短介绍和更新方向。先把 B 站和小红书集中在这里，后续如果 ADHDer 内容沉淀成体系，再拆出独立专题页会更清晰。
channel.introEn: This page works best as a platform hub for profile links, short introductions, and the latest direction of your work. Keep Bilibili and Xiaohongshu here first, then create a dedicated topic page later if your ADHDer content grows into a bigger knowledge base.
